ops.title: Fleet cc-guides re-migration 2026-07-16: canonical_sha 7427f102, 22 migrated / 3 deferred / 8 bespoke / 6 noop
ops.body:
Fleet-wide re-migration onto modular cc-skills shared fragments (ask-before-assuming, code-review-response, parallelize, writing-plans, ccx, version-control), executed 2026-07-16 from cc-context session 60dfd1d8.

**canonical_sha: `7427f10241e99d2c9f6352528326fb0dabbabd08`** (cc-skills main). Phase 2 upstream commits: `647ffd32` (version-control.md ship auto-rebase wording + ccx.md entry 13, closing task b29295028b) + `7427f102` (self lock bump). Prerequisite ccx v0.21.0 released to brew first (ship auto-rebase in the installed binary before docs describe it).

**Migrated (22, all Guides CI green, lock pinned to canonical):** cc-context e982fd5b, synckit de71314f, cc-factory 45ef587f, cc-interact 99b0e2a9, cc-merge 518f96de, cc-notes 458c5cf3 (repo-specific refs/cc-notes sync sentence preserved in new `vcs-notes` fragment), cc-orchestrate 2127c1ea (CI lint red = pre-existing golangci debt, bug fe7c286 in its store), cc-present fdc283a3, cc-review 4a86b9e8, cc-runtime 3e4e15e4, cc-sentiment 2fe97b17, cc-squash 1422b8f4 (integration test red = pre-existing latent bug 63f2040 in its store; proven unrelated — commit touches only docs paths and failure reproduces locally), cc-steer — no wait, cc-steer deferred — cookie-sync c30ccaad, dailies 6ffcf3e7, docker-dsl 649e96a9 (git-only: no version-control adoption), fly-me-to-the-moon a690dffc, fusekit f05c0758, claude-pool e5fa1cad, slop-cop 905bae21 (git-only), spawnllm 04bd3314, write-like-me 6c6ab24f (ship auto-rebase conflicted on a mid-run main push; manually recovered per ship's recipe — see lessons), yclaw 63cd85f0.

**Deferred (3, trees held by concurrent sessions):** captain-hook, cc-steer, cc-transcript → backlog task 61b5448b. **Bespoke skipped (8):** cc-vigil, crm, ego, repo-sync, room-scan, semisweet, stream-trade, yasyf.com → backlog task ee0ea525. **Already modern, noop (6):** cc-guides, cc-pane, cc-skills, cc-sudo, experiment-at-home, getaway (stale pins refresh via routine re-renders).

**Lessons for the deferred re-runs** (workflow script `fleet-guides-migrate-fleet.js` in the session's workflows/scripts dir has all contracts + gates embedded; dispatch with `args {"only": ["<repo>"]}`):
1. Superseded-sentence whitelists must capture per-repo VARIANTS verbatim (cc-notes had a colon + `-r <change> -o main@origin` variant of the dirty-tree sentence); span-level and artifact-level sentence splitting differ, so a whitelisted span sentence can re-fail at the content_lost gate in its split form (cc-review).
2. A content_lost hit on CLAUDE.md can be an OLD-PIN UPGRADE, not data loss: write-like-me's "lost" luna/sol routing sentences existed verbatim in claude-rules at its old pin fd24afa7 and were rewritten upstream — verify via `git -C cc-skills show <old-pin>:plugin/guides/md/claude-rules.md` before treating as loss.
3. ship v0.21 conflict rollback recovery, proven live: `jj rebase -b @- --destination 'bookmarks(exact:"main")'`; cc-guides render cannot parse a conflict-markered lock (TOML error) — restore the lock from your side (`git show <commit>:...lock >`) first, then render resolves artifacts deterministically; `jj squash`, `jj bookmark move exact:main --to @-`, push.
4. Shared-tree mid-run hazards are the dominant failure class (6/6 aborts): domain-scope any dirty-tree gate to .claude/fragments/** + lock artifacts, resolve TRUNK in preflight, and ship with explicit `--bookmark <trunk>` so stale sibling bookmarks can't break resolution.
